runway_notes.08:
RWY 08 - left-hand pattern (inference, pattern S of RWY to avoid Lupfig village to the north).
Elev 1310 ft; pattern altitude 2310 ft (1000 ft AGL).
Uncontrolled; AD INFO 123.550 (Birrfeld AD).
Within TMA Zurich Lower (5500 ft); stay below.
Grass parallels (08L/R) used for glider operations only - not represented here.
runway_notes.26:
RWY 26 - right-hand pattern (inference, pattern S of RWY to avoid Lupfig village to the north).
Elev 1310 ft; pattern altitude 2310 ft (1000 ft AGL).
Uncontrolled; AD INFO 123.550 (Birrfeld AD).
Within TMA Zurich Lower (5500 ft); stay below.

metadata.source: X-Plane apt.dat (ARP, runway thresholds, AD frequency); Wikipedia DE for elevation and runway dimensions; VRPs are plausibility-based topographic inferences
metadata.verified_by: thWelly + plugin-author research; VRPs and pattern direction are plausibility-based - needs verification against current Skyguide VAC before flight
metadata.notes: ARP and runway thresholds taken from X-Plane apt.dat (Global Airports). Elevation 1310 ft per Wikipedia (apt.dat 1210 is outdated). Runway 08/26 paved 718 m x 20 m asphalt (Wikipedia); the two grass parallels (08L/R, 08R/L) used by gliders are intentionally omitted - this plugin focuses on motor-VFR procedures. VRPs N/E/S/W are topographic inferences placed approximately 2.5-3 NM from ARP toward Brugg, Wettingen, Schinznach and Othmarsingen respectively - they are NOT the published Skyguide VAC reporting points and must be cross-checked. Pattern direction (08=left, 26=right) is inferred to keep pattern south of the runway (away from Lupfig). AD frequency 123.550 confirmed by apt.dat row 1051.
